name: Malt Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased and floured loaf pan with dimensions of 9 x 5 x 3 inches.
4. Bake for approximately 70 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Remove from the pan and allow to cool thoroughly before slicing.
